---
title: "help_page_3"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

The **Analysis** tab contains sub-sections accessible via vertical navigation on the left side:

<div style="color:green; ">
1. Descriptives
</div>

- **Select Region**: Choose from dropdown (10 regions)
- **Select Year**: Use the dropdown to pick a specific year (2012–2023) for annual statistics
- **Year Range**: Use the slider to display overall statistics across multiple years
- **Outputs**: Annual statistics table, overall statistics table

<div style="color:green; ">
2. Time Series
</div>

- **Select Region**: Choose region from dropdown
- **Date Range**: Adjust using date range input

<div style="color:black; font-weight:bold; ">
Outputs:
</div>

- Observed values (actual malaria cases)
- Trend (long-term pattern)
- Seasonal (monthly patterns)
- Remainder (random fluctuations)


<div style="color:green; ">
3. Seasonality
</div>

- **Select Region**: Choose region from dropdown
- **View**: Monthly patterns over twelve years (2012–2023)

<div style="color:black; font-weight:bold; ">
Outputs:
</div>

- Box plots for malaria and climate variables
- Statistical tests (Kruskal-Wallis, Friedman)


<div style="color:green; ">
4. Model Estimates
</div>

- **Select Region**: Choose region from dropdown
- **View**: GAM results for the selected region

<div style="color:black; font-weight:bold; ">
Outputs:
</div>

- Model performance metrics (Adjusted R², Deviance Explained, GCV)
- Parametric coefficients
- Smooth terms significance


<div style="color:green; ">
5. Model Diagnostics
</div>

- **Select Region**: Choose region from dropdown
- **View**: Model validation plots for the selected region

<div style="color:black; font-weight:bold; ">
Outputs:
</div>

- Observed versus Fitted values
- Q-Q plot (normality check)
- Response versus Fitted plot


<div style="color:green; ">
6. Model Plots
</div>

- **Select Region**: Choose region from dropdown
- **View**: Visual representation of model smooth effects for the selected region

<div style="color:black; font-weight:bold; ">
Outputs:
</div>

- Smooth plots for long term trend (time), seasonality (months), temperature, rainfall
- Interaction plots (time×months, temperature×rainfall)

---
